title: Create: Basic Additions
description:
Adds some basic additions to the Create Mod.

Like why aren't they here already?

Enjoy!
body:
Adds some basic additions to the Create Mod.

Like why aren't they here already?

Enjoy!


Forge & Fabric available!  
_Have not tested on Quilt or other loaders, though they might work._
* * *
<details>
<summary>Basic Gearshifts:</summary>
  Flips the rotation without redstone!
  
  ![Images: Basic Gearshifts](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/G2hjjjFv/images/1b173ea27ce6188cc2dc60de791b077f56ea1ea0.gif)
</details>

* * *
<details>
<summary>Gearshifts:</summary>
  Different casings for the Gearshifts!  
  
  ![Images: Gearshifts](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/G2hjjjFv/images/0dcaa154880535ad92d398f8d4f5522ae48d25da.gif)
</details>

* * *
<details>
<summary>Gearboxes:</summary>
  Different casings for the Gearboxes!  

  ![Images: Gearboxes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/G2hjjjFv/images/d9eeaee09b9a67343ce6c21ff3753f5e2c2a5327.gif)
</details>

* * *
<details>
<summary>Encased Shafts:</summary>
  Different casings for the Encased Shafts!  

  ![Images: Encased Shafts](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/G2hjjjFv/images/d9eeaee09b9a67343ce6c21ff3753f5e2c2a5327.gif)
</details>

* * *
<details>
<summary>Encased Gears:</summary>
  Different casings for the Encased (Large) Gears!  
  
  ![Images: Encased (Large) Gears](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/G2hjjjFv/images/c915b1e561e623e193115d8105108d949ab87da9.gif)
</details>

* * *
If you have an idea on what else to add to this mod, please leave a suggestion on github!
